items.title: Porting a 128-expert MoE (Gemma-4 26B-A4B) to AWS Inferentia2 — where every rank weighted the wrong experts
items.summary: The MoE was the hard one: a dual-path FFN, a sparse expert loop that won't trace, and a bug where the device output was empty while the CPU reference was perfect and every unit test passed.
